name: Papayas with Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Cooked shrimp, peeled and deveined and cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix shrimp, mayo, lemon juice, curry powder, chutney, salt, and pepper together.
2. Cut papayas in half and remove seeds.
3. To serve, pile shrimp salad into papaya halves. Garnish with lime wedges.
